name: SR-Agent: An Experience-Driven Agentic Framework for Post-Ranking Strategy Refinement in E-Commerce Recommendation

description: arXiv:2607.17719v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: User experience is a first-class objective in industrial e-commerce recommender systems (RS). Post-ranking strategies, which govern diversity, similarity, and exposure over a ranked list, are widely deployed in industrial RS for their simplicity and low serving cost. However, as the online recommendation environment evolves continuously, these...
author: Hanchen Yang, Kaiwen Yang, Junpeng Zhuang, Yang He, Keting Cen, Bochao Liu, Zhongbo Sun, An Liu, Zhongteng Han, Chenyi Lei
